Translation.Please enter your username and password: Please enter your username and password
Translation.Video Subject: Video Subject (Provide a keyword, :red[AI will automatically generate] video script)
Translation.Script Language: Language for Generating Video Script (AI will automatically output based on the language of your subject)
Translation.Custom Script Requirements Placeholder: Example: use a lighter tone, fit TikTok style, target young viewers, make the opening more suspenseful
Translation.Use Custom System Prompt Help: When enabled, this replaces the default script generation rules. Intended for advanced prompt users.
Translation.Generate Video Script and Keywords: Click to use AI to generate [Video Script] and [Video Keywords] based on **subject**
Translation.Video Script: Video Script (:blue[① Optional, AI generated  ② Proper punctuation helps with subtitle generation])
Translation.Generate Video Keywords: Click to use AI to generate [Video Keywords] based on **script**
Translation.Please Enter the Video Subject: Please Enter the Video Script First
Translation.Generating Video Script and Keywords: AI is generating video script and keywords...
Translation.Video Keywords: Video Keywords (:blue[① Optional, AI generated ② Use **English commas** for separation, English only])
Translation.Match Materials to Script Order Help: Disabled by default. Mainly applies to online material sources. When enabled, keywords are generated in script order and materials are downloaded/combined in that order to reduce visual mismatch with the current voiceover.
Translation.Custom audio will be used directly. TTS: Custom audio will be used directly. TTS synthesis will be skipped for this task.
Translation.Custom Background Music File: Please enter the file path for custom background music:
Translation.Background Music Volume: Background Music Volume (0.2 represents 20%, background music should not be too loud)
Translation.Enable Subtitles: Enable Subtitles (If unchecked, the settings below will not take effect)
Translation.Custom: Custom position (70, indicating 70% down from the top)
Translation.Please enter a value between 0 and 100: Please enter a value between 0 and 100
Translation.Rounded Subtitle Background Help: Disabled by default. When enabled, subtitle backgrounds use a rounded translucent style that better fits the text width.
Translation.Video Script and Subject Cannot Both Be: Video Subject and Video Script cannot both be empty
Translation.You can download the generated video fro: You can download the generated video from the following links
Translation.Groq Model List Load Failed: Unable to load Groq model list right now. You can still enter a model name manually; it will be validated during generation.
Translation.Groq API Key Required for Model List: Add a Groq API key to load available models automatically.
Translation.Get Help: If you need help, or have any questions, you can join discord for help: https://harryai.cc
Translation.Please Select a Valid Video Source: Please Select a Valid Video Source
Translation.Voice Example: This is an example text for testing speech synthesis
Translation.No voices available for the selected TTS: No voices available for the selected TTS server. Please select another server.
Translation.tts_provider_tips.siliconflow:
##### SiliconFlow TTS Settings
- **Speed**: range [0.25, 4.0], default is 1.0
- **Volume**: uses the Speech Volume setting; default 1.0 maps to gain 0
Translation.tts_provider_tips.mimo:
##### Xiaomi MiMo TTS Settings
- Uses Xiaomi MiMo V2.5 preset voices
- Speed and volume are currently handled by the provider defaults
Translation.tts_provider_tips.elevenlabs:
##### ElevenLabs TTS Settings
- **API Key**: create one at https://elevenlabs.io/app/settings/api-keys
- Mark voices as Favorite in the ElevenLabs voice library to make them appear here
Translation.tts_provider_tips.chatterbox:
##### Chatterbox TTS Settings (self-hosted)
- Run an OpenAI-compatible Chatterbox server, such as devnen/Chatterbox-TTS-Server or travisvn/chatterbox-tts-api, and set Base URL to its /v1 endpoint
- Voices is a comma-separated list of voice names exposed by your server; add a -Female or -Male suffix only to label the gender in this dropdown
- Speech Volume is not applied for Chatterbox because the OpenAI /audio/speech API has no volume field; use Speech Rate instead
Translation.Hide Basic Settings:
Hide Basic Settings

Hidden, the basic settings panel will not be displayed on the page.

If you need to display it again, please set `hide_config = false` in `config.toml`
Translation.Click to show API Key management: Click to show API Key management
Translation.Manage Pexels and Pixabay API Keys: Manage Pexels and Pixabay API Keys
Translation.Please enter a valid API Key: Please enter a valid API Key
Translation.Select Pexels API Key to delete: Select Pexels API Key to delete
Translation.Select Pixabay API Key to delete: Select Pixabay API Key to delete
Translation.Manage Pexels, Pixabay and Coverr API Ke: Manage Pexels, Pixabay and Coverr API Keys
Translation.Select Coverr API Key to delete: Select Coverr API Key to delete
Translation.Video Encoder Help: Advanced option. libx264 is the safest default. When a hardware encoder is selected, the app falls back to libx264 if the current FFmpeg, GPU, or driver cannot use it.
Translation.llm_provider_tips.ollama:
##### Ollama Configuration
- **API Key**: enter any value, for example `123`
- **Base Url**: usually http://localhost:11434/v1
  - If `MoneyPrinterTurbo` and `Ollama` are **not on the same machine**, use the IP address of the Ollama machine
  - If `MoneyPrinterTurbo` runs in `Docker`, use `http://host.docker.internal:11434/v1` when available{docker_hint}
- **Model Name**: run `ollama list`, for example `qwen:7b`
Translation.llm_provider_tips.ollama.docker_hint: > Container environment detected. If Base Url is empty, `http://host.docker.internal:11434/v1` is used by default.
Translation.llm_provider_tips.openai:
##### OpenAI Configuration
> A global VPN/proxy may be required in some regions
- **API Key**: [create one on the OpenAI platform](https://platform.openai.com/api-keys)
- **Base Url**: leave empty for official OpenAI; set a compatible endpoint when using an OpenAI-compatible provider such as OpenRouter
- **Model Name**: use a model you have access to; for compatible providers, enter the model ID supported by that platform
Translation.llm_provider_tips.aihubmix:
##### AIHubMix Configuration
- **API Key**: create one in the AIHubMix console
- **Base Url**: https://aihubmix.com/v1
- **Model Name**: defaults to gpt-5.4-mini; you can also use other model IDs supported by AIHubMix
Translation.llm_provider_tips.aimlapi:
##### AIML API Configuration
- **API Key**: [create one at AIML API](https://aimlapi.com/app/keys)
- **Base Url**: https://api.aimlapi.com/v1
- **Model Name**: for example `openai/gpt-4o-mini`, `openai/gpt-4o`, `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5`, or `google/gemini-3-flash-preview`
Translation.llm_provider_tips.evolink:
##### EvoLink Configuration
- **API Key**: [create one on EvoLink](https://evolink.ai/dashboard/keys)
- **Base Url**: https://direct.evolink.ai/v1
- **Model Name**: defaults to gpt-5.5; you can also use other model IDs supported by EvoLink
Translation.llm_provider_tips.volcengine:
##### VolcEngine Ark Configuration
- **Sign up**: [register on VolcEngine](https://www.volcengine.com/activity/ai618?utm_campaign=hw&utm_content=hw&utm_medium=devrel_tool_web&utm_source=OWO&utm_term=MoneyPrinterTurbo)
- **API Key**: create one in the VolcEngine Ark console
- **Base Url**: https://ark.cn-beijing.volces.com/api/v3
- **Model Name**: enter an enabled model ID from the Ark console, for example doubao-seed-2-1-turbo-260628
Translation.llm_provider_tips.moonshot:
##### Kimi / Moonshot Configuration
- **API Key**: [create one on the Kimi Open Platform](https://platform.kimi.ai/console/api-keys?aff=MoneyPrinterTurbo)
- **Base Url**: https://api.moonshot.cn/v1
- **Model Name**: defaults to `kimi-k2.7-code`; see the [model list](https://platform.kimi.ai/docs/models?aff=MoneyPrinterTurbo)

Why recommended:
- **Fits the video creation workflow**: helps generate scripts, extract stock-footage search keywords, and improve final footage relevance
- **Strong long-context capability**: useful for longer topics, batch scripts, and complex prompts
- **Flexible billing**: pay only for what you use, with transparent costs
Translation.llm_provider_tips.oneapi:
##### OneAPI Configuration
- **API Key**: enter your OneAPI key
- **Base Url**: enter your OneAPI base URL
- **Model Name**: enter the model name you want to use, for example claude-3-5-sonnet-20240620
Translation.llm_provider_tips.qwen:
##### Qwen Configuration
- **API Key**: [create one on DashScope](https://dashscope.console.aliyun.com/apiKey)
- **Base Url**: leave empty
- **Model Name**: for example qwen-max; see the [model list](https://help.aliyun.com/zh/dashscope/developer-reference/model-introduction#3ef6d0bcf91wy)
Translation.llm_provider_tips.azure:
##### Azure Configuration
> [Learn how to deploy a model](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/ai-services/openai/how-to/create-resource)
- **API Key**: create one in the [Azure portal](https://portal.azure.com/#view/Microsoft_Azure_ProjectOxford/CognitiveServicesHub/~/OpenAI)
- **Base Url**: leave empty
- **Model Name**: enter your deployment name
Translation.llm_provider_tips.gemini:
##### Gemini Configuration
> A global VPN/proxy may be required in some regions
- **API Key**: [create one on Google AI Studio](https://ai.google.dev/)
- **Base Url**: leave empty
- **Model Name**: for example gemini-1.0-pro
Translation.llm_provider_tips.grok:
##### Grok Configuration
- **API Key**: enter your Grok API key
- **Base Url**: enter your Grok API base URL
- **Model Name**: for example grok-4.3
Translation.llm_provider_tips.groq:
##### Groq Configuration
- **API Key**: [create one on Groq](https://console.groq.com/keys)
- **Base Url**: https://api.groq.com/openai/v1
- **Model Name**: for example llama-3.3-70b-versatile
Translation.llm_provider_tips.deepseek:
##### DeepSeek Configuration
- **API Key**: [create one on DeepSeek](https://platform.deepseek.com/api_keys)
- **Base Url**: https://api.deepseek.com
- **Model Name**: deepseek-chat
Translation.llm_provider_tips.mimo:
##### Xiaomi MiMo Configuration
- **API Key**: [create one in Xiaomi MiMo](https://platform.xiaomimimo.com/docs/zh-CN/quick-start/first-api-call)
- **Base Url**: https://api.xiaomimimo.com/v1
- **Model Name**: defaults to mimo-v2.5-pro; you can also use other available models from the official docs
Translation.llm_provider_tips.modelscope:
##### ModelScope Configuration
- **API Key**: [create one on ModelScope](https://modelscope.cn/docs/model-service/API-Inference/intro)
- **Base Url**: https://api-inference.modelscope.cn/v1/
- **Model Name**: for example Qwen/Qwen3-32B; see the [model list](https://modelscope.cn/models?filter=inference_type&page=1)
Translation.llm_provider_tips.ernie:
##### ERNIE Configuration
- **API Key**: [create one in Baidu Qianfan](https://console.bce.baidu.com/qianfan/ais/console/applicationConsole/application)
- **Secret Key**: [create one in Baidu Qianfan](https://console.bce.baidu.com/qianfan/ais/console/applicationConsole/application)
- **Base Url**: enter the request URL; see the [documentation](https://cloud.baidu.com/doc/WENXINWORKSHOP/s/jlil56u11#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E)
Translation.llm_provider_tips.pollinations:
##### Pollinations AI Configuration
- **API Key**: optional; leave empty for public access
- **Base Url**: https://text.pollinations.ai/openai
- **Model Name**: use `openai-fast` or specify another model name
Translation.llm_provider_tips.litellm:
##### LiteLLM Configuration
> [LiteLLM](https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm) routes to 100+ LLM providers through a unified interface.
> Set your provider API key as an environment variable, such as `OPENAI_API_KEY`, `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`, `GEMINI_API_KEY`, or `AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID`.
- **Model Name**: use LiteLLM format, for example `openai/gpt-4o`, `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-20250514`, `bedrock/anthropic.claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022-v2:0`, or `gemini/gemini-2.5-flash`. See the [full provider list](https://docs.litellm.ai/docs/providers)
